Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Amending Judgment
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE STEVEN SCHOONOVER'S Motion For Order Amending Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order granting the motion and a separate amended judgment.

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones. #3689.

Sarah S. Wright, Esq. appeared for plaintiff NetIncome Ventures, Inc.
No appearance by defendants Mike W. Blaylock or Redopus, LLC.
Defaults entered against defendants Mike W. Blaylock and Redopus, LLC on August 23, 2007 and April 30, 2007, respectively.
Doe defendants dismissed today, July 8, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff NetIncome Ventures, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Mike W. Blaylock and Redopus, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,368.43.
Punitive Damages - $50,000.00.
Costs - $5,789.88, for a total of $62,158.31.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
